reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 북 완전 좋아해요 ( •͈ᴗ•͈)◞ ෆ⃛ 특히 계란후라이 노란색끈이랑 맨 첫장 잔디페이지를 북북북 한답니다 ㅎㅎㅎ덕분에 밥먹는 시간도 길어지고 잘 노는 장난감이 생겨서 너무 좋아요!! 솜이의 최애 쿠킹북 추천합니다 (✿◡‿◡) 밥이없어도 계속 긁으면서 놀아요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love the nose work book! ( •͈ᴗ•͈)◞ ෆ⃛ Solmi especially loves scratching at the sunny-side egg yellow string and the first grass page hahaha. Thanks to this, mealtime lasts longer and I'm so happy to have such a great toy to play with!! I highly recommend Solmi's favorite cooking book (✿◡‿◡) She keeps scratching and playing with it even without treats lol

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
제가 산 노즈워크 장난감 중 제일 만족이에요 ㅠㅠ
일반 한 종류 노즈워크는 금방 끝나기도 하고,, 오래 못가는데 ㅠㅠ 요건 출근길에 넣어주고 오면 제법 오래 갖고 놀아요! 그리고 나눠서 다른 방법들이라 간식 넣어두고 찾아먹는것도 너무 재밌어 하더라구요 
무엇보다 저렴한 제품이랑 확실히 차이가 나요! 튼튼해서 잘 찢기지도 않고 오래 갖고 놀고 있어용 또 다른 종류도 사고 싶네요 ㅎㅎ 요거 강추 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: This is the most satisfying nose work toy I've ever bought ㅠㅠ Regular nose work toys finish too quickly and don't last long ㅠㅠ but this one keeps her entertained for quite a while when I leave it with her on my way to work! Plus, since it has different sections, she has so much fun hiding treats and finding them. Most importantly, there's a clear difference from cheaper products! It's durable and doesn't rip easily, and she's been playing with it for a long time. I want to buy other versions too hehe Highly recommend this! ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 요****
reviews.content: 나이가 10살될때까지 앞발을 왕성하게 쓰던 울어르신ㅋㅋ웬만한 노즈워크를 사줘도 5분컷이라 좀 어려운것을 찾다가 바잇미를 알게되었는데! 정말 예쁜데다 난이도도 딱 좋아서 저도 편하고 어르신도 환장하십니다ㅎㅎ 말잘들을때만 가끔 꺼내주는 소중한 장난감이에용~
reviews.content_en: My senior doggy who used to be very active with her front paws until she turned 10 lol would finish most nose work toys in 5 minutes, so I was looking for something more challenging. Then I discovered BITE ME! It's absolutely beautiful and the difficulty level is just right, so both she and I are really happy hehe It's such a precious toy that I only take it out when she's been extra good~

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content: 진짜 잘샀어요!출근전에 주고 가면 거의 한시간가까이 붙잡고 있네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ혼자두고 출근하기 항상 미안했는데 오래놀수있는 장난감이라도 주고 오니까 맘이 좀 놓여요..침대갔다가 바닥에 끌고갔다가..코박고 춤추고 있어요.보는것만으로도 넘 기여워요ㅜㅜㅜ지금은 다 놀고 뻗어서 자고있네요!곧 다 뜯겨질거같지만..뜯어지면 또 사볼게요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Seriously, great purchase! She holds onto it for almost an hour when I give it to her before work lolol I always felt bad leaving her alone, but now that she has a toy to play with for a long time, I feel so much better... She's dragging it from the bed to the floor, putting her nose in it, doing a little dance. Just watching her is so adorable ㅜㅜㅜ Right now she's all tired out and sleeping! It'll probably get torn up soon, but I'll buy it again when it does lol

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
오래전부터 욕심내다가 할인적용되어 서슴없이 구매했어요!!
정말 내새끼한테 주는 선물 아까움이 없으련만..
너무 이뿌게 생겨서 제가 곱게 간딕하고 싶을정도였지만 내새낀 금새 자기거란걸 알고 낼름 물고 먹튀!!
간식을 여기저기 넣어서 줬더니 너무너무 좋아해요!!
사용 후 걸어두면 내려달라고 연신 런치박스 올려다보며 끙끙거려요
비록 며칠만에 사진처럼 너덜너덜해졌지만 다행히 강쥐얼굴만은 생존상태입니다!!
단순히 하이파이브하며 간식 건네는것보다 내새끼가 이 런치박스를 엄청 반갑게 맞이하며 기다리고 즐거움을 표현하니 사랑듬뿍입니다!!
사이즈가 너무 작아 아쉬움이 남아요
계획이 있으시면 더 크게 제작해주심 반가울 것 같아요!!
망설이시는분들께 추천드립니다!!
이쁜 내새끼 즐거워하는 모습은 런치박스의 선물입니닷!!
reviews.content_en: I've wanted this for a long time, and when the discount was applied, I bought it without hesitation!! I felt it was worth giving to my sweet pup... It's so pretty that I wanted to keep it nicely, but my baby quickly realized it was hers and grabbed it right away!! I hid treats in different spots and she absolutely loves it!! After use, when I hang it up, she keeps looking up at the lunch box whining for it. Even though it got a bit worn down after just a few days like in the picture, thankfully the pup's face still looks intact!! Rather than simply high-fiving and handing over treats, my baby greets this lunch box so happily, waits for it, and shows such joy that it's full of love!! The only disappointment is that the size is too small. If you plan to make bigger versions, that would be great!! I recommend this to anyone who's hesitating!! The joy on my sweet pup's face is the gift of this lunch box!!

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content: 아기야 독서하자!! 하고 가지고 나오면 너무 너무 좋아해요 아기가 노즈워크 고수라.. 좀 어려운 거 찾다가 사줬는데 가장 좋아하는 장난감이 됐어요 정말 고수인지.. 20분이면 다 먹고 더 달라고 쳐다보지만 다른 노즈워크보다는 훨씬 긴 시간이라 너무 만족하고 엄청 물어뜯는데도 안 뜯어지는 거 보면 완전 튼튼합니다!! 다른 장난감은 다 뜯어졌을텐데 얘는 멀쩡해요!! 다음에 다른 버전도 사주려구요 👍
reviews.content_en: When I say 'baby, let's read!' and pull it out, she loves it so much! Since my baby is a nose work expert, I got her something more challenging, and it became her favorite toy! She's such an expert that she finishes it in 20 minutes and begs for more, but it lasts way longer than other nose work toys so I'm very satisfied. Even though she chews it a lot, it doesn't get torn, which shows how incredibly durable it is!! All her other toys would've been destroyed by now, but this one is still in perfect condition!! I'm planning to buy another version next time 👍

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 아가 말티푸인데 책 펼치자 마자 자기껀 줄 알고 달려들더라구요 ㅎㅎ아직 아기라 물수 있는 계란후라이 부분을 제일 좋아하요 !사료랑 간식 숨겨놓으면 더 좋아할것 같아요 !
reviews.content_en: My baby maltipoo rushed right at it as soon as I opened the book, knowing it was hers hehe Since she's still little, she loves the soft egg part she can bite! I think she'll like it even more when I hide kibble and treats in it!

reviews.name: 보****
reviews.content: 이리저리 들고다니면서 잘 꺼내먹어요! 사주길 잘했어요, 넘기면서 찾아 먹는 모습 넘 귀여워용! 한참을 찾아 먹어서 외출 시 해주고 나가요 ㅎ_ㅎ 갖고 다니기도 좋아서 사진에서도 보이듯이 차에서도 해줬어요!
reviews.content_en: She carries it around here and there and takes out treats to eat! I'm so glad I got it for her, and the way she flips through and finds treats is so cute! She spends a long time searching for them, so I give it to her before going out hehe It's easy to carry around too, and as you can see in the picture, I've even used it in the car!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
어떤 노즈워크든 3일만 하면 모든걸 간파하고 질려하시는 저희 강아지가 꽤나 오래 흥미가지고 있는 노즈워크북 중 하나입니다 ㅋㅋ
아무래도 여러 노즈워크들이 한번에 모여있으니 그런가봐요 모든지 파괴하는 저희 강아지에게서도 플라스틱 조이개 빼고는 다 살아남을만큼 튼튼한 것도 마음에 듭니다 추천해요!
reviews.content_en: This is one of the nose work books that keeps my pup interested for quite a while, which is rare since he figures out any nose work in just 3 days and gets bored lol I guess it's because there are so many different nose work activities all together. I also love how durable it is—even for a pup who destroys everything, everything survives except the plastic squeaker. I recommend it!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요ㅠㅠㅠㅠ정신을 못차리고 계속 넘겨가면서 하고있어요ㅎㅎ매우매우매우 만족합니다 천이 보풀날것같지않아 더 좋아요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute ㅠㅠㅠㅠ She can't focus and keeps flipping through it hehe I'm very very very satisfied! I especially love that the fabric won't pill, so that's even better hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강아지가 엄청 좋아해요!! 다른 노즈워크는 쉬워서 금방 찾던데 이건 한참 찾네요ㅋㅋㅋ 캠핑 버전도 사서 번갈아가면서 주려고요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves it!! 😄 Other nose work toys are too easy so he finds them right away, but this one takes him a while to figure out ㅋㅋㅋ I'm going to buy the camping version too and alternate between them hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이거 진짜 좋아요❣️ 일단 넘 귀엽고 간식숨길곳도 많고 
간식 한번 넣어주면 30분정돈 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: This is seriously so good❣️ First of all it's super cute and there are tons of spots to hide treats in. Once I put treats in, he plays with it for about 30 minutes

reviews.name: 은****
reviews.content:
초음엔 별로 관심없더니 이거 가지고 가면 간식 준다는걸 알고 기다려요 
너무 못찾아서 우리애는 안 똑똑한가보다 했는데 반복하니 익숙해져서 그런가 금방 찾고 뒤돌아 가네요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: At first he wasn't interested at all, but once he realized this means treats, he waits for it 😄 I thought my pup wasn't that smart since he couldn't find them at first, but after repeating it he got the hang of it and now he finds them quickly and comes back for more ㅋㅋ

reviews.content:
너무너무 좋아하네요~ 엄마바라기인데 불러도 쳐다도 안봅니다.ㅋ
저렇게 소리내서 킁킁~거리는 모습 처음봐요 ㅋㅋㅋ
우리 애가 너무 좋아해서 친구에게도 선물 하려고 추매합니다~^^
reviews.content_en: He loves it so much!! He's usually a total mommy's boy and doesn't even look when I call him, but ㅋ This is the first time I've seen him sniffing and doing that snort snort sound ㅋㅋㅋ My pup loves it so much I'm recommending it to get as a gift for a friend too~^^

reviews.name: b****
reviews.content:
강아지 공부책 너무 귀여워요
난리나서 가지고 노네요 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The dog puzzle book is so adorable! He goes crazy playing with it. Love it!

reviews.name: 승****
reviews.content: 오래 갖고 놀고 좋아해요! 튼튼해서 오래갈거 같아요!!
reviews.content_en: He plays with it for a long time and loves it! It's sturdy so I think it'll last a while!!

reviews.name: a****
reviews.content: 너무 잘가지고 놀아요~~
reviews.content_en: He plays with it so well~~

reviews.name: w****
reviews.content:
아기자기 실용적인 장난감이네요
신경쓴 제품이라 확연히 느껴집니다
reviews.content_en: It's an adorable and practical toy. You can tell the makers really put thought and care into this product

reviews.name: r****
reviews.content:
슬개골 수술 후 철장생활 해야하느라 지루해보여서
하나 사줬더니 정말 열심히 해요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: After knee surgery my pup had to stay in a crate and looked so bored, so I got him this and he really goes at it hard ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 밥 빨리 먹어서 여기저기 숨겨줍니다 재밌게 찾아 먹네요~^^
reviews.content_en: He eats meals too fast so I hide his food in here and he enjoys finding and eating it~^^

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 재밌게 가지고 노니까 사준 보람이 있어요🐰
reviews.content_en: It was worth buying it since my bunny has so much fun playing with it! 🐰

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
진짜 너무너무너무너무너무너무 귀엽고
이걸 하고있는 강아지도 귀엽고 너무 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's seriously so incredibly cute, and the puppy playing with it is also so cute, it's just adorable!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 플레이북 넘 귀욥구요^^ 킁킁거리느라 정신을 못차리네욬ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The playbook is super cute ^^ My pup is so busy sniffing around that they can't focus on anything else ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 열공합니다... 자다가도 깨서 오케 꺼내는지...  공부를 향한 열정이 터집니댜
reviews.content_en: Hard at work... even waking up from naps to get the toy out... the passion for studying is just bursting out 💪

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content: ㅎㅎㅎ잘 가지고 노네요 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
reviews.content_en: Haha my pup plays with it so well 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.name: 라****
reviews.content:
우리 강아지 첫노즈워크!
집에 혼자 두는게 미안해서 노즈워크 알아보는중에
바잇미 광고속 노즈워크가 너무 예쁘고
간식수납도 많은 것 같아 구매했어요
처음 노즈워크 해보는데 넘넘 재미있게 잘 놀아서
뿌듯합니다 예민한 말티즈라 새로운걸 접하는데
많은 시간이 걸리는데 잘 노는 모습이 뿌듯해요^^
reviews.content_en: My puppy's first nose work toy! I felt bad leaving my dog alone at home, so I was looking into nose work toys. The nose work toy in the BITE ME ad looked so pretty, and it seemed to have plenty of space for storing treats, so I decided to buy it. It's my pup's first time doing nose work and they're having such a blast playing with it - I'm so proud! Since my dog is a sensitive Maltese and it takes time to get used to new things, I'm really proud seeing them play with it so well ^^

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 울집 강아지가 넘나 좋아하고 저도 넘 맘에 드는 ㅋㅋㅋ 장난감이네요 우리아기가 열공?간식찾기 합니다
reviews.content_en: My puppy loves it so much and I love it too ㅋㅋㅋ My baby is seriously committed to finding treats! This toy is amazing!

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content:
주인이 더 좋아하는 노즈워크템!
진짜 너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅠㅠ 웰컴딜로 싸게 구매해서 너무 좋구 간식 숨숨 공간이 다양하게 많은 점도 정말 좋아요:)
펼쳐놓고 쓰는것보다 공간도 적게 차지 해서 보관하기도 좋은 점 칭찬해요! 무엇보다 디자인 정말정말 귀여움.. 강아지도 재밌게 노즈워크하니 구매하길 정말 잘했어요😆
reviews.content_en: A nose work item that even the owner loves more! It's seriously so cute ㅠㅠㅠ I got it on a welcome deal for super cheap and I'm so happy! The variety of hiding spots for treats is amazing, and I really love that it takes up less space when stored compared to when it's laid out. Most importantly, the design is absolutely adorable.. My puppy has such a great time doing nose work with it, so I'm really glad I made this purchase! 😆

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
바잇미 첫구매딜로 엄청 저렴하게 구매했어요. 
처음 받았을때 본 느낌은 엄청 알차다는거에요. 
예전에 아이 키울때 샀던 촉감북 비슷하면서 아이가 가지고 놀던 생각 나더라구요. ㅎㅎ
너무 알찬 다양한 노즈워크 구성이 쏙 맘에 듭니다. 
아직 어린 강아지라 잘 할수있을까 궁금했는데 
처음에 3분정도 경계하더니 30분을 가까이 정신없이 몰두합니다. 
사료를 잘 안먹어서 사료 몇개 끼워줬는데 다 먹었어요.
요즘도 사료 잘 안먹을때 요 장난감 활용해서 남은 사료 해결합니다. 너무 저렴한 가격에 득템해서 대만족입니다.
reviews.content_en: I got BITE ME on a first-time buyer deal for an amazing price. When I first received it, I was impressed by how packed with features it is. It reminded me of the touch-and-feel books I used to buy for my kid - so many memories! ㅎㅎ I really love the thoughtfully designed variety of nose work activities. I was curious if my young puppy could handle it, but after being cautious for about 3 minutes, they were intensely focused for nearly 30 minutes. Since my puppy doesn't eat kibble well, I put a few pieces in and they ate them all. Now whenever my puppy doesn't want to eat their kibble, I use this toy to get them to finish their meals. I'm totally satisfied with this amazing find at such an affordable price!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
처음에 디자인이 너무 귀여워서 구매했는데, 받아보니까 퀄리티도 좋고 활용도도 높아서 만족스러워요! 런치박스 컨셉이라 그런지 구성 자체가 다양해서 강아지가 쉽게 질리지 않고 오래 가지고 놀 수 있더라고요. 간식 숨길 수 있는 공간도 여러 군데라 노즈워크 난이도 조절하기도 좋아요.

저희 강아지가 평소에 집중력이 짧은 편인데, 이건 간식 찾느라 꽤 오래 집중하는 모습이 보여서 신기했어요. 집에서 혼자 있는 시간에도 심심하지 않게 잘 놀 수 있어서 너무 만족스럽고요. 재질도 부드러우면서 탄탄해서 쉽게 망가지지 않을 것 같고, 세탁도 가능해서 위생적으로 관리하기 좋아요.

무엇보다 사진 찍으면 너무 귀엽게 나와서 인스타용으로도 최고예요📸 노즈워크 처음 입문하시는 분들이나, 새로운 장난감 찾는 분들께 추천드리고 싶어요!
reviews.content_en: I originally bought it because the design was so adorable, but once I got it, I was impressed by the quality and versatility! The lunchbox concept design means the overall composition is so varied that my dog doesn't get bored easily and can play with it for a long time. Since there are multiple spots to hide treats, it's also great for adjusting the difficulty level of the nose work. My puppy normally has a short attention span, but with this toy searching for treats, I was amazed at how long they could focus. They play happily even when left alone at home, so I'm really satisfied. The material is soft yet sturdy, so it doesn't seem like it'll break easily, and since it's washable, it's great for keeping it hygienic. Most importantly, it comes out so cute in photos - it's perfect for Instagram! 📸 I'd recommend this to anyone just starting out with nose work or looking for new toys!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 평소에 장난감을 가리지 않고 그냥 물 수 있는 건 죄다 좋아하는 소금이입니다 (◍•ᴗ•◍) ♡♥︎ 근데 그중에서도 유독 플레이북을 좋아하더라고요. 사료를 숨겨 놓지 않아도 하루 종일 앞발로 파고 물고 뜯고 가지고 놀아요. 계란 노른자 빼는 것도 재미있는지 쑤셔 넣으면 빼고 넣으면 빼고 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 소금이 하는 거 보니 빨리 아작 날 거 같아요., 작살나면 ,, 또 사줘야죠  뭐 결론 : 최고예요. 디자인도 깜찍 ( ღ'ᴗ'ღ )
reviews.content_en: Namu is not picky about toys and loves anything he can chew on (◍•ᴗ•◍) ♡♥︎ But out of all of them, he especially loves the PLAYBOOK. Even without treats hidden inside, he spends the whole day digging, chewing, tearing, and playing with his front paws. He seems to find it fun taking the egg yolk in and out too—he pulls it out when I put it in, and pulls it out when I put it in again ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ Watching Namu, it looks like it'll get destroyed pretty quickly. When it breaks, I guess I'll just have to buy another one 😂 Bottom line: it's the best. The design is also super cute ( ღ'ᴗ'ღ )

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 처음이라 잘 할 수 있을까 걱정했는데 완전 정신 빼앗겨서 장난 아니에오 ㅎㅎ 간식 던져두고 나가면 급하게 먹으려다 달려오고 그랬는데 이고 던져주고 나가니까 신경도 안 써요 ㅠㅠㅠㅠ 사길 너무 잘 했어요 난이도가 아주 적당한 거 같아요 !!
던져두고 나가서 카메라 보면 몇십분은 간식 찾다가 쉬다가 또 찾기도 하고 그러더라구욤 !!!
원래는 나가면 짖었는데 정신 팔리면 짖는 것도 잊어요 ㅎㅎ 짱 !!
reviews.content_en: I was worried about trying nose work for the first time, but my pup got completely absorbed in it—it's no joke! ㅎㅎ Before, when I'd throw treats down and leave, he'd rush to eat them quickly, but with this toy thrown down, he doesn't even pay attention to me leaving ㅠㅠㅠㅠ I'm so glad I bought it! The difficulty level seems just right!! When I leave it out and check the camera later, he spends tens of minutes searching for treats, resting, then searching again !! He used to bark when I left, but now he gets so focused he forgets to bark ㅎㅎ It's awesome!!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
받자마자 자기껀줄알고 빨리달래요 잠깐 올려둔사이 간식도 없는데 가져가서 놀고 있어요^^
레벨 단계가 여러가지로 되어 있어서 좋아요 전에쓰던건 5분도 안되서 다 끝났는데 20분째 아직고 집중하고 있어요
혼자 두는 시간이 길어서 오래 갖고 놀수있는걸 찾다가 구매 했습니다 ^^!
디자인도 너뮤 귀엽고 아가도 너무 좋아하니 만족해요!
reviews.content_en: As soon as I got it, he thought it was his and came running up so fast 😄 While I set it down for a moment, he took it away to play with even though there were no treats in it yet. I love that there are several difficulty levels! The toy I used before was done in less than 5 minutes, but he's been playing with this one for 20 minutes straight and still concentrating. I bought it because I needed something he could play with for a longer time when left alone ^^! The design is so adorable and my pup loves it so much, so I'm really satisfied!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
바이밋 마이 런치박스 노즈 워크 너무너무 귀엽고 저희집 애기가 엄청 잘 가지고 놀아요! 요즘 최애 장난감 입니다! 
간식 넣어 주면 혼자 잘 놀아요! 너무 귀여워요!!!! 앗 배송도 엄청 빨랐어요!!!
reviews.content_en: The BITE ME Lunchbox Nose Work is so incredibly cute and my baby loves playing with it so much! It's his favorite toy these days! When I put treats in, he plays by himself so well! It's so cute!!!! Oh, and the shipping was super fast!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
<웰컴딜>로 너무 좋은 가격에 만족합니다
캠핑갈때 놀잇감으로 챙겨가랴구요
배송받고 바로 간식넣어 주니 영심히 찾아 먹네요~^^
좋은 제품 깜찍한 디자인 만나 너~~~무~~~ 조아요 ㅎ ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I'm so happy with the great price through the <Welcome Deal>! I'm planning to bring it along when we go camping. Right after I got it and put treats inside, he eagerly searches for them ^^. I absolutely love meeting such a great product with such a cute design ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
계속 눈여겨보던 제품을 웰컴딜로 저렴하게 득템했습니다.
울 강아지는 모든 장난감을 금방 싫증내는데 이건 재밌게 잘 가지고 노네요~~~ 맘은 급한데 간식이 잘 안나오니 몇군데를 물어뜯어놓긴 했는데 한장 한장 넘기며 노는 모습이 어찌나 귀여운지.. 큰 강아지를 위해서 좀 더 튼튼하고 더 큰 사이즈도 있었으면 좋겠어요~~~
reviews.content_en: I'd been eyeing this product for a while and got it at a great price through the Welcome Deal. My dog gets bored with most toys quickly, but he really enjoys playing with this one ~~~ He's an eager boy and the treats don't come out easily, so he's chewed on a few spots, but the way he flips through page by page is so adorable.. I wish there was a bigger, more durable size for larger dogs ~~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
원래부터 노즈워크를 엄청 좋아하는우리 강쥐.이건 책처럼 되어있어 흥미를 더 느끼고 너무 좋아합니다
오자마자 간식을 넣어줬더니 심취 그 자체ㅋ 정신없이 갖고 놀아요
우리 애기가. 잘 놀아서 만족하고
저렴하게 잘 사서  한번더 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: My pup already loves nose work toys so much. This one being designed like a book makes it even more interesting and he loves it! As soon as I put treats in, he got completely absorbed ㅋ He plays with it so intently. I'm satisfied that my baby plays with it so well, and I'm satisfied again knowing I got a great deal!

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content: 노즈워트 매트를 사줄까하다가 부피도 크고 맘에 드는것도 없구 마침 바잇미 7주년 세일하길래 고민할것도 없이 플레이북으로 구매 핬어요! 초보티 팍팍 내면서 열심히 놀아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 얼마나 재밌게 놀았는지 침범벅 흔적 좀 보세여 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ 다른버젼도 다같이 샀는데 요거 마스터 하면 넘어가야겠어요~~ 예쁜 플레이북 많이 만들어주세오! 바잇미 쵝오
reviews.content_en: I was thinking about getting a nose work mat, but it was too bulky and nothing really appealed to me. Then BITE ME had their 7th anniversary sale, so I didn't even hesitate and bought the PLAYBOOK! Even as a beginner, he's playing with it enthusiastically ㅋㅋㅋㅋ You can see all the drool marks from how much fun he's having ㅎㅎㅎㅎ We bought other versions too, and once he masters this one, he'll move on to the next!! Please make more pretty PLAYBOOKs! BITE ME is the best~

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
바잇미 플레이북은 믿고 구매해요
튼튼하고 아이가 완전 좋아하거든요
전에는 벌쓰데이 플레이북인가 그거 샀었는데
그거랑 비교하면 난이도가 쉬운 것 같아요!
출근할 때 노즈워크 잔뜩 숨겨놓고 가면 아이가 신나서 찾아먹으니 미안한 마음이 조금은 놓이네요
근데 아이가 하라는 노즈워크보다 스토퍼 물어뜯는 걸 더 좋아해서 아주 아작이 났어욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ ㅠ
reviews.content_en: I buy BITE ME PLAYBOOK with confidence. It's durable and my pup absolutely loves it. I bought a Birthday PLAYBOOK before, and compared to that, this one seems easier difficulty-wise! When I leave for work with lots of nose work treats hidden, my pup gets excited searching for them, so I feel a little less guilty. But my pup seems to prefer chewing on the stoppers more than actually doing the nose work, so it got pretty destroyed ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ ㅠ

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 이거 진짜 최고 ... !!! 이 장난감 준 이후로 애기 얼굴을 볼 수 없어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 기가 막히게 잘 찾아내고 엄청 킁킁대요 제가 책 정리해주려고 가져가면 뺏을라고 난리를 친답니다 ... 바잇미 아이스크림 노즈워크도 정말 잘 쓰고 있는데 그거는 20분 용이라면 요건 1시간정도? ㅎㅎ 밥먹을때나 씻을 때 주고 가면 너무 좋아요 ㅋㅋㅋ 비싸도 !!! 비싼 값어치를 한답니다 ㅋㅋ 짱 추천해요 !!!
reviews.content_en: This is seriously the best...!!! Since I gave him this toy, I can barely see my pup's face ㅋㅋㅋ He finds treats amazingly well and sniffs so much. When I try to take it away to organize, he throws a fit trying to snatch it back... I'm also really using the BITE ME Ice Cream Nose Work, but that one's good for 20 minutes, whereas this one lasts about an hour? ㅎㅎ It's so great to give it to him when he's eating or when I need to bathe him ㅋㅋㅋ Even if it's expensive!!! It's absolutely worth the price ㅋㅋ I highly recommend it!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
강아지들이 너무 잘갖고 놀아요
헤어나오질 못해요
작아서 갖고 다니기도 편해요
reviews.content_en: The dogs absolutely love playing with it! They can't put it down. It's also convenient to carry around since it's small.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 노즈워즈 담요보다 간편하게 사용할 수 있고 우리 집 사랑둥이가 너무 잘 갖고 놀아서 뿌듯하네요! 예쁘고 귀여운 노즈워크북 만들어 주셔서 감사합니다~
reviews.content_en: It's more convenient to use than the snuffle mat, and our little one loves playing with it so much—I'm so proud! Thank you for creating such a pretty and adorable nose work book~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
두번째 구매입니다.첫번째는 쿠*에서 구매했고 똑똑하진 않지만 힘이 쎈아이라 사진과 같은 지경이 되버려서 새로 구매해요.

 노즈워크 장난감을 거의 모두 해봐서 대부분 1-3분컷이예요. 3살이되니 새로운 것도 엄청 빨리 끝내버리는데 요건 특히나 두번째 초록색 끈있는 페이지에서 오래걸려요ㅎㅎ 깊숙해서 그런지.. 다 뜯어버리네요^^;; 세탁해도 빨리 말라서 좋은데 한번 빨고 줘야할것같네요. 별5점 주려고 했는데 마지막 사진같이 돌돌이에 초록 천?잔여물?이 묻어나와요..강아지 입에 묻어나는건없어도 입에 다들어가니 걱정되네요.
새로운 버전으로 페이지 수가 좀더 많다던가 어렵게 개어른용으로 업뎃 되길 바래봅니다
reviews.content_en:
This is my second purchase. I got the first one from Cou*, but since my pup isn't the brightest but has a lot of strength, it ended up like in the photo, so I'm ordering a new one.

I've tried almost all the nose work toys, so most only last 1-3 minutes. Now that he's 3, he finishes new toys super quickly, but this one especially takes a while on the second page with the green string ㅎㅎ Maybe because it's deep... he ends up tearing everything out ^^;; I like that it dries quickly even after washing, but I think I'll need to wash it regularly. I was going to give it 5 stars, but like in the last photo, there's some green fabric residue or lint on the roller... Even though it doesn't stick to my dog's mouth directly, it all goes in, so I'm worried.
I hope for an updated version with more pages or a harder adult dog version in the future.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
조금 어려워하는 것 같지만 
그래도 그만큼 오래 가지고 놀수 있어서 좋은 것 같아요
꽤 튼튼하게 만들어져서 오래오래 가지고 놀았으면 좋겠네요! 

고무줄 조이는 플라스틱 부분은 
열심히 냄새도 맡고 후비구 흔들다가 결국 
머리에 꽁 맞길래 뺐어요 .. 😢 !

다른 버전도 구매하고 싶네요!
reviews.content_en:
It seems a bit challenging for him, but since he can play with it longer because of that, it seems good! It's made pretty sturdy, so I hope he enjoys it for a long time!

The plastic part with the rubber band—he sniffs and digs at it enthusiastically and shakes it, but eventually it got stuck on his head so I took it off.. 😢 !

I want to buy other versions too!

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
우라애기 첫 공부책은 바잇미에서 구매했답니다 ㅎ
도착하고 뜯기전부터 빨리 공부하고싶다고 난리 나네요!ㅋㅋ공부 싫어하는 주인 안닮아서 다행 ㅋㅋ
두번째 페이지 초록색주머니?! 그 부분은 깊이가 좀 있어서 우리 애기는 꺼내기가 힘들어하더라고요! 그래도 열심히 킁킁킁하면서 1시간정도 공부했어요 ㅎㅎ
사람애기꺼처럼 너무 귀엽고 예뻐요! 
너무 열공해서 졸라매는 끈이 첫 공부때 깨졌어요 ㅋㅋ
근데 우리애기는 매면 아예 못꺼낼것 같아서 그렇게 상관없을것 같습니다!
 들고디니기에 편한 사이즈라서 또 좋아요^^
앞으로도 이쁜 장난감 만들어주세요!
reviews.content_en:
Ura got her first study book from BITE ME ㅎ Before it even arrived and before opening it, she was going crazy wanting to study right away! ㅋㅋ Thank goodness she doesn't take after her owner who hates studying ㅋㅋ The second page with the green pocket?! That part is pretty deep, so my girl has trouble getting the treats out! But she studied for about an hour sniff-sniff-sniffing away ㅎㅎ It's so cute and pretty just like human kid books!
She was studying so hard that the drawstring snapped on the first study session ㅋㅋ But since my girl wouldn't be able to get anything out if it were tied anyway, it doesn't really matter!
It's also great because it's a convenient size to carry around ^^ Please keep making pretty toys!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 저희 집 댕댕이 최애 장난감이에요~ 꺼내는 순간부터 폴짝폴짝 뛰고 난리나요~ 너무 심하게 흔들고 놀아서 실밥이 다 뜯어지고 난리도 아니네요~ 다시 주문해야될듯해요~ 때가 너무 타는데 세탁을 어떻게 해줘야될지를 모르겠어요~ 암튼 진짜 책보는 애처럼 페이지 넘기고하는게 너무 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's my pup's favorite toy~ From the moment I pull it out, she's jumping and going crazy~ She shakes it so intensely that the seams are coming completely undone, it's a mess~ I'll probably need to order again~ The stains are really showing, but I'm not sure how to wash it~ Anyway, it's so cute how she actually flips through the pages like she's reading a book!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 할 수 있는 포켓이 다양하며 튼튼하게 만들어진 것 같아서 좋아요. 앞쪽 삑삑이랑 뒤쪽 바스락에도 관심을 많이 보이구요. 초록색 부분은 끈을 당겨서 난이도를 올릴 수 있을 것 같아서 오래오래 쓸 수 있을 것 같아요. 한번 주면 굉장히 오래 가지고 놀아서 만족입니다. 간식을 다 빼먹고 나서도 한동안 삑삑이를 삑삑 물고다닌다든지 계란후라이 물고 턴다든지 난리에요 ㅎㅎ 담요 형식의 노즈워크보다 훨씬 오래 가자고 노는 것 같아요. 그리고 제품 자체가 너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅠ ♡
reviews.content_en: I like that there are varied pockets for nose work and it seems to be made sturdy. She shows a lot of interest in the squeaker at the front and the crinkly part at the back too. The green part can have difficulty adjusted by pulling the string, so it seems like it can be used for a long time. Really satisfied since she plays with it for such a long time when given once. Even after eating all the treats, she carries around the squeaker going squeak-squeak or the egg toy and goes crazy ㅎㅎ She plays with this much longer than the blanket-style nose work toys. And the product itself is so adorable ㅠㅠ ♡

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
노즈워크를 좋아하는 또미에요
집에 있는건 쉽게 끝나 아쉬웠는데 다양하게 숨길수 있으니 오랜 시간 가지고 노네요^^
폭발적인 반응이라 너무 만족합니다 
집중하느라 얼굴이 안 나왔네요 하루종일 코를 킁킁대고 있어요 다른 시리즈도 차차 구입해볼게요
reviews.content_en: Tommy loves nose work! The ones at home were finished quickly which was a shame, but since I can hide things in various ways, she plays with it for a long time^^ She had such an explosive reaction, I'm very satisfied. Her face didn't show because she was so focused—her nose is twitching all day long. I'll gradually buy other series too.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
양배추랑 플레이북 하나씩 사줬는데 첫째가 둘다 자기꺼라고 안비켜줘요🤣 간식 쪼만한거 숨겨두니 하루종일 가지고놀아요 플레이북은 처음인데 좀 질려하면 시리즈별로 다사주려고요💓
장난감도 귀여워서 제맘에도 드는데 댕댕이들은 더좋아하는거같아요 책읽는게 넘귀엽습니다🐶
reviews.content_en: I got one cabbage toy and one playbook each, but my firstborn won't share either one saying they're hers 🤣 She plays with it all day long with just small treats hidden in it. It's my first time with the playbook, but if she gets bored, I plan to get different series ♥️ The toys are cute so I love them too, but the doggies seem to love them even more. The way she reads the book is so adorable 🐶

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요! 첫 노즈워크 장난감인데 강아지가 참 좋아해요 끈을 물어뜯어서 개봉한 지 2시간 만에 끊어졌지만 괜찮아요(이빨이 날카로워요) 잘 쓰겠습니다~ 감사해요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! It's my dog's first nose work toy and he really loves it. He chewed the string and it snapped 2 hours after opening it, but that's okay (his teeth are sharp). I'll use it well~ Thank you!
